websites.title: Portfolio v2
websites.description: A brutalist personal site built with plain HTML and a lot of opinions.

websites.title: Studio Nori
websites.description: Branding site for a small ceramics studio. Scroll-driven animations, zero JS frameworks.

websites.title: Docs Redesign
websites.description: Redesigned the docs for an open-source CLI tool used by 12k developers.

games.title: Dungeon Typist
games.description: A typing-speed roguelike where every keystroke is an action. Made in 72 hours for Ludum Dare.

games.title: Gravity Flip
games.description: Puzzle platformer with one mechanic taken to its logical extreme.

games.title: Terminal Quest
games.description: Text adventure that runs inside your actual shell. ls to explore, rm to fight.

music.title: Slow Burn EP
music.description: Four tracks of ambient electronic music composed during a winter residency.

music.title: Generative Drones
music.description: Infinite ambient music engine — no two listens are the same.

tools.title: Grip
tools.description: A fast grep-like CLI for structured logs. Parses JSON lines and filters by field.

tools.title: Recap
tools.description: Weekly digest generator that pulls from GitHub, Linear, and your calendar.

tools.title: Typecheck Action
tools.description: GitHub Action that runs tsc, mypy, and go vet in parallel and posts a unified report.

art.title: Grid Studies
art.description: A series of 100 generative pieces exploring grid distortion. Each one is unique.

art.title: Ink & Code
art.description: Physical prints produced by a pen plotter driven by Go programs.

apps.title: Moodboard
apps.description: Offline-first image board for designers. Drag, drop, done. No account needed.

apps.title: Flashpack
apps.description: Spaced-repetition flashcards that live in your terminal.

apps.title: Daylog
apps.description: A one-line-a-day journal that emails you your entry from exactly one year ago.
